childhood.familyBackground: Son of Kim Jae-chul, founder and chairman of Dongwon Group, one of Korea's major fisheries and trading conglomerates. Self-made patriarch who built the company from humble origins.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 한국 최대 규모 원양어업 및 해산물 기업 동원그룹을 창업한 김재철 회장의 장남. 가난한 집안에서 시작해 자수성가한 부친의 기업가 정신을 계승했다.
childhood.education: Korea University (Business Administration), Keio University Graduate School of Business Administration (MBA)
childhood.earlyLife: Born October 10, 1963, in Gangjin County, Jeollanam-do. Kim grew up watching his father build an empire through fisheries and trading. After graduating from Korea University's business program, he worked on Alaskan fishing vessels as a crew member to understand the family business fundamentals before entering formal management.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1963년 10월 10일 전남 강진군에서 태어났다. 아버지가 원양어업을 통해 제국을 건설하는 과정을 지켜봤다. 고려대 경영학과 졸업 후 알래스카 원양어선에서 선원으로 일하며 가업의 근본을 배운 후 경영진으로 입사했다.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Dongwon Industrial as crew member after MBA; gained hands-on fisheries experience
careerTimeline.eventKo: 동원산업에 선원으로 입사, 원양어업 현장 경험 습득

careerTimeline.event: Transitioned to formal management position at Dongwon Securities
careerTimeline.eventKo: 동원증권 대리로 입사, 금융 부문 경력 시작

careerTimeline.event: Acquired Korea Investment Securities; transformed into Korea Investment & Securities holding company structure; became CEO
careerTimeline.eventKo: 한국투자증권 인수, 금융지주회사 체제로 전환해 대표이사 사장 취임

careerTimeline.event: Promoted to Vice Chairman of Korea Investment Financial Holdings
Appointed Chairman of Korea Investment Financial Holdings after 9 years as Vice Chairman
Recognized as one of Korea's top financial leaders alongside Park Hyun-joo of Mirae Asset; focused on global expansion
careerTimeline.eventKo: 미래에셋의 박현주 회장과 함께 국내 금융투자업계 양대 산맥으로 평가, 글로벌 확장 추진

personalTraits.knownFor: Transforming Korea Investment Securities from mid-tier brokerage to major financial holding company; strategic acquisitions and global expansion strategy; financial sector leadership
personalTraits.knownForKo: 한국투자증권을 중견 증권사에서 주요 금융지주회사로 변환; 전략적 인수합병 및 글로벌 확장 전략; 금융업계 리더십
